notes: This template is for the INCAR repair benchmark.
It should not reveal which parameter is wrong or what corruption family was injected.
It should not mention reference answers, scoring rules, or repair labels.
system_prompt: You are an expert VASP user. You will receive a material, a task description, and an existing INCAR draft. Review it carefully and output only the final INCAR text, without markdown or explanation.

placeholders.formula: Material formula or short material label.
placeholders.task_type: Benchmark task type such as static_scf, geometry_relax, line_mode_bands, or dos_nscf.
placeholders.prompt_goal: Task-level goal label from the dataset.
placeholders.material_description: Short factual description of the material. Keep it neutral and non-revealing.
placeholders.prompt_constraints: Task-level instruction shared by all cases of the same task_type.
placeholders.prompt_context: Task-level context shared by all cases of the same task_type.
placeholders.incar_draft: The existing INCAR draft to be reviewed and corrected.
